title: Robin’s Warning
description: The truth behind the attack on Iceburg begins to emerge as the masked intruders and CP9 agents move in the shadows.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Paulie, Iceburg, Nico Robin, Chopper, Rob Lucci. The truth behind the attack on Iceburg begins to emerge as the masked intruders and CP9 agents move in the shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: They must be hiding out right now.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: ... by the way... what the hell...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: No. Some people got in the way...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What!? They escaped from angry big bro!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: woodw!! Big bro did the evil grin....~

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If we let anyone get through...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How's it look in the back?

summary: The truth behind the attack on Iceburg begins to emerge as the masked intruders and CP9 agents move in the shadows.
